description: Introduces the science of Physical Geography using an earth-systems approach. Course themes include global climates and climate change, hydrology and water resources, geomorphology and natural hazards, and biogeography; with focus on how geographic sciences are applied to address real world issues.
formerlyNotesText: part of GEOG 110, part of GEOG 120, part of EOS 110, part of EOS 120
supplementalNotes: • Not open to students with credit in any of GEOG 110 (EOS 110), GEOG 120 (EOS 120) if taken prior to May-Aug 2011.
title: Our Natural Earth
